01 · Foundation

A global category,
built on real
infrastructure.

Most healthcare AI starts as software looking for distribution. Flash Pharmacy starts with pharmacy operations, fulfilment capacity, care relationships, and real patient touchpoints. That gives the AI Pharmacist somewhere powerful to live from day one.

02 · Vision

The hospitals of the future
are not buildings;

they are care networks
from all over the world,
surrounding people.

Peter Shahbeigi · CEO

03 · The System

One AI Pharmacist.
Four connected
operating layers.

Flash Pharmacy connects physical access, clinical intelligence, fulfillment operations, and real-world insight into one platform built for international scale.

01 · Signals
Verified patient signals
Wearables, home devices, and care touchpoints create a trusted evidence layer for safer medication decisions.
  • Wearable + companion app
  • 24 / 7 telemetry
  • EMR-integrated
02 · Access
FlashPods, everywhere
Private AI-enabled pharmacy access deployed where patients already live, work, recover, and receive care.
  • Biometric scan + dispense
  • Pharmacist-grade triage
  • Care homes · workplaces · clinics
03 · Intelligence
AI Pharmacist platform
The intelligence layer connects guidance, routing, pharmacist escalation, fulfillment, and follow-up across every market.
  • Personal AI assistant
  • Booking + symptom triage
  • Always-on care channel

04 · Intelligence

Pharmacist AI.
The clinical brain
of Flash Pharmacy.

Not a chatbot. A fully autonomous clinical system, validating every prescription, monitoring every patient, catching every dangerous interaction before it harms anyone.

0Human error tolerance
340msValidation latency
99.997%Drug-interaction recall
24 / 7Always-on monitoring
Patient-facing AI Mobile triage + care access
PHARMACIST.AI · live trace 11,402 rx/min

05 · Try Me

Try the
AI Pharmacist.

Ask a medication, refill, symptom, or care access question. This investor demo shows the patient workflow and escalates serious symptoms instead of pretending to diagnose.

Flash Pharmacy AI Pharmacist
live demo
Hi, I am the Flash Pharmacy AI Pharmacist demo. Ask about refills, medication timing, side effects, symptoms, or booking care. I can guide next steps and prepare the right action.

This investor demonstration is for illustrative purposes only. It does not collect, process, or transmit patient information, facilitate actual appointment bookings, or substitute for the professional judgment, review, or oversight of licensed pharmacists or physicians.

06 · Platform

The Operating Loop

A simple global system: access, intelligence, fulfillment, insight.

01
Access
  • FlashPods and mobile entry
  • Patient identity and intake
  • Medication questions captured
02
Intelligence
  • AI Pharmacist guidance
  • Risk checks and triage
  • Pharmacist escalation when needed
03
Fulfillment
  • Inventory visibility
  • Refills and replenishment
  • Delivery and pickup routing
04
Insight
  • Outcome data compounds
  • Market patterns emerge
  • The system improves by country
